inputs.text: traditional watercolor painting, aquarelle, wet-on-wet technique, visible paper texture, soft pastel color washes, flowing translucent pigments, hand-painted on cotton paper, loose brush strokes, bleeding colors, artistic fine art, NOT digital illustration, NOT line art, NOT webtoon, NOT manhwa, NOT anime, attractive good-looking characters (beautiful women and handsome men) with pleasant appealing faces, prefer bright and well-lit imagery with clear luminous atmosphere unless the scene must be dark, Joseon dynasty Korea, 15th century, Hanyang, the same Korean woman in plain muted hemp hanbok, black hair, East Asian features, seen from behind on the misty hilltop, and faintly suggested far behind her in soft blur the tiled roofs of a distant palace she has left, pale blue dawn palette with muted hanji tones, a sense of a royal past now out of reach, no face visible, solemn and melancholic, distinctly Korean Joseon-era (not Chinese or Japanese), the woman on the right third, room to pan
